description: Periodically scatter caltrops at your feet during combat. Enemies in the zone are slowed and take light damage over time.
tooltipTemplate: Scatter caltrops every {trap.placeInterval:1}s. Enemies in the zone ({trap.radius} radius) are slowed to {trap.slowMultiplier%} of their speed and take {trap.damagePerSecond:1} DPS for {trap.durationSeconds:1}s.
